examples: When the elk got up, the tarp slid off.
Deer and elk populations—major food sources for the wolf—grew rapidly.
I covered the elk with a tarp and sat down near it, wrapping myself in blankets.
On a ridge a few miles away, we spot a herd of 40 grazing elk.
Back on Kimball Mountain, with trigger pulled, the elk herd disperses, except for my cow.
